description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish, brown and black bag from lino perros to your accessory collection. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit.Height: 25 cmWidth: 29 cmDepth: 13 cmMade of synthetic leather and blended fabric for durabilityHas one main roomy, zipped compartment, with an inner zipped pocket and an organiser pouch for essentialsTwo short handles woven through metallic loops with two tassels on the handle for carrying ease and styleStriped and metallic stud design on the front for styleStitch detailing, branded zips and brand badge appliqué d on the front CareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
